name: Sticky Orange Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. PREHEAT OVEN TO 400°F.
2. Grease the muffin pans or line them with paper baking cups.
3. Using a small grater, grate the rind from the oranges and set aside, removing only the bright orange part.
4. With a small, sharp knife, remove all remaining peel and trim the oranges so they fit into the bottom of the muffin pans.
5. Cut the oranges into slices about 1/4-inch thick, pick out seeds, and set the slices aside.
6. Add about 1 teaspoon honey to the bottom of each muffin cup and place an orange slice on top.
7. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, oatmeal, baking powder, salt, and sugar. Stir with a fork or wire whisk.
8. Add the reserved grated orange rind, eggs, milk, and melted butter; stir just until mixed.
9. Spoon the batter over the orange slices, filling each cup about 2/3 full.
10. Bake for 15-to-20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center of a muffin comes out clean.
11. Remove from the oven and serve warm.
